message:
feat(web): render OperatorSelector in SessionForm

Completes the OperatorSelector integration by adding the UI section
to the session creation form.

Changes:
- Add "Operator Selection" section with h2 heading
- Render OperatorSelector component with:
  - value: operatorSelection state
  - onChange: setOperatorSelection handler
  - disabled: tied to mutation.isPending for form submission state

The OperatorSelector appears between the Message fields and Options
sections, allowing users to customize operator assignments before
creating a new Brenner Protocol session.

Note: The operatorSelection state is currently local to the form;
future work will integrate it with the session kickoff prompt builder
to generate role-specific prompts based on selected operators.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
